dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses 20-day moving average crossover for both buy and sell signals. Entry conditions trigger on price crossing above (buy) or below (sell) the sma_20. Exit conditions are reversal signals (opposite crossover). Direction is context-dependent: long entry when price crosses above sma_20, short entry when price crosses below sma_20. Test period: January 2, 1990 through March 28, 1991 on crude oil futures.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses 20-day moving average crossover for both buy and sell signals. Entry conditions trigger on price crossing above (buy) or below (sell) the sma_20. Exit conditions are reversal signals (opposite crossover). Direction is context-dependent: long entry when price crosses above sma_20, short entry when price crosses below sma_20. Test period: January 2, 1990 through March 28, 1991 on crude oil futures.

source_rule_text: Use a 20-day moving average to generate buy and sell signals in crude oil futures.
